title: LLMCostEstimated
description: Runtime-side cost estimate produced by apps/worker/cost-mapper. The transform is pure: tokens × catalog rate = USD. No scoring, no ranking, no routing. event_id is a deterministic hash of (source_event_id, catalog_version) so replays are idempotent. Cost in integer USD minor units (1 unit = 0.01 USD).

event_id.description: Globally unique event identifier. Derived from SHA-256 of (source_event_id, catalog_version) so the same upstream event re-priced against the same catalog produces the same id.

source_event_id.description: event_id of the originating llm.runtime.normalized event.

source.description: Runtime surface that produced the source event. Only runtime sources are priced — exporter-sourced events already carry reconciled cost.

estimated_cost_usd_minor_units.description: Estimated cost in USD minor units (1 unit = 0.01 USD). Integer per F008 §10.

catalog_version.description: Version stamp of the pricing catalog used for this estimate. Operators bump the catalog via a PR; replays against the same catalog version reproduce the same event.

catalog_approximate.description: True when the catalog entry is marked as an approximation (e.g. unlisted variant priced against the closest known model).

pricing_currency.description: Three-letter pricing currency from the catalog entry. USD when the catalog rate is dollar-denominated.

estimated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp at which the cost-mapper produced this estimate.

recorded_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp from the originating runtime event, when present.
